data.title: New luxury homes in Bellevue, Washington's Enclave at Kelsey Creek community offer access to schools and job centers.
data.description: The Enclave at Kelsey Creek neighborhood in Bellevue presents a collection of upscale residences, providing residents with proximity to esteemed schools and local job hubs. This community boasts new luxury homes equipped with modern amenities and style. Enjoy living in a prime location with access to top-rated schools, ensuring quality education for families. Additionally, residents benefit from convenience with nearby employment centers, offering opportunities for work and career growth. Experience luxurious living in Bellevue's Enclave at Kelsey Creek neighborhood, with homes that cater to comfort and style for families seeking an elevated lifestyle.

data.title: Arista Networks stock soars as Q2 revenues reach $2.21 billion, exceeding estimates. Adjusted EPS rises to 73 cents. CFO mentions crossing $1 billion in non-GAAP operating income.
data.description: Arista Networks Inc. (NYSE: ANET) exceeded expectations with its second-quarter financial results. The company reported a revenue increase of 30.4% year over year, reaching $2.21 billion, surpassing estimates of $2.11 billion and the management’s guidance of $2.1 billion. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) rose to 73 cents from 53 cents compared to a year ago, beating estimates of 65 cents. The gross margin for the quarter was reported at 65.2%. The company's CFO, Chantelle Breithaupt, highlighted that the non-GAAP operating income surpassed $1 billion. Analysts are positive about Arista Networks' performance, with a bullish outlook on the company achieving a $10 billion revenue goal by 2026. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Passo acquires 17,200 sq ft parcel on Santa Monica Blvd for $xxM, plans 162-unit affordable housing community in LA.
data.description: In an announcement made in Los Angeles, Passo revealed the acquisition of 11970 Santa Monica Boulevard in an off-market deal. This approximately 17,200-square-foot plot of land had remained untouched for around five decades prior to this transaction. Passo intends to construct a new affordable housing complex at this location, which will consist of approximately 162 units, utilizing the benefits of the Los Angeles ED-1 program. The forthcoming structure is projected to cover close to 80,000 square feet, addressing the pressing need for more affordable housing options in the area.

data.title: Apple stock surged after dodging U.S. tariffs, retaking key levels, signaling positive outlook.
data.description: The stock of Apple saw a significant increase on Friday amid speculations that the company may be excluded from U.S. tariffs. This surge allowed Apple's stock to surpass a crucial level. The positive development came after concerns that tariffs could impact the company's performance.

data.title: Honesty leads to success for individuals and teams, fostering trust and productivity. More at Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Fostering a culture of honesty in the workplace can lead to increased productivity, not only for individuals but also for teams. By prioritizing honesty, you can earn the trust of your staff, ultimately boosting success. Studies have shown that companies with a strong emphasis on honesty tend to perform better, with a reported increase of up to 30% in overall productivity. Embracing honesty not only makes you a better leader but also cultivates a positive work environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. So, consider the impact of honesty on your organization - it could be the key to unlocking greater success.

data.title: Frederick Arts Council to hold Art in the Park at Frederick Keys game on Aug 15th at Harry Grove Stadium.
data.description: The Frederick Arts Council (FAC) will be hosting the annual Art in the Park event in collaboration with the Frederick Keys at Nymeo Field at Harry Grove Stadium in Frederick, Maryland on Friday, August 15th starting at 7pm, with gates opening at 6pm. This community event has been a favorite amongst locals and features various artistic displays and activities. This year's edition is expected to draw a large crowd, showcasing the talents of numerous artists and creators, as well as offering an enjoyable evening for attendees.
